entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The cereal crop under investigation for yield improvement

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total weight of grains produced per unit area

entities.name: GRAIN NUMBER PER SQUARE METER
entities.description: The total number of grains produced per square meter

entities.name: GRAIN NUMBER PER PANICLE
entities.description: The number of grains found on a single panicle

entities.name: LEAF AREA
entities.description: The total surface area of the leaves

entities.name: LIGHT INTERCEPTION
entities.description: The amount of solar radiation captured by the plant canopy

entities.name: EXTENDED VEGETATIVE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of increasing the duration of the vegetative growth phase

entities.name: NON-INDUCTIVE LONG PHOTOPERIOD
entities.description: A lighting condition used to delay the transition to reproductive growth

entities.name: D2 DWARFING GENE
entities.description: A gene that reduces plant height and alters the distribution of assimilates

entities.name: ASSIMILATE PARTITIONING
entities.description: The allocation of photosynthates to different plant organs

entities.name: PANICLE INITIATION
entities.description: The stage when the plant begins to form the panicle

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: The reproductive stage of the plant

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of total upper leaf surface area to the surface area of the land on which the crop grows

entities.name: ASSIMILATE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total amount of organic matter produced through photosynthesis

entities.name: PANICLE NUMBER
entities.description: The number of panicles produced per plant

entities.name: GRAIN DENSITY
entities.description: The number of grains per unit surface area of the panicle

entities.name: GRAIN SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions or weight of individual grains

relationships.description: varies partitioning between panicle and stem
increased density leads to smaller grains
